历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 5749 → 6421 → 9828 → 10046 → 7531, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (9828), continuing to 10046 in 2024, and a sharp rebound to 7531 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 7531. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang's Physics Category was 14 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 17 in 2024, and dropped back to 14 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15 students, an increase of 1 student (+7.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition, tending to push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 62nd in 2025, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition, enhancing attractiveness to candidates. In 2025, reputation evaluation was slightly negative (professor assessment controversy), but no significant negative signals appeared in the 2026 reputation document. Douyin heat total ranking is 73rd, rated as 'average', with comprehensive heat around 380,000, short video platform exposure at a mid-level, with no abnormal heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Law was rated A, Applied Economics A-, Law is a member of the 'Five Academies and Four Departments', with outstanding strength in finance, economics, and law disciplines, strongly attracting both liberal arts and science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer categories (including Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) have a social heat rating of 'Recommended', Statistics categories 'Recommended' (67.03), Law categories 'Divided and Wait-and-See' (63.54), Finance/Economics categories 'Divided and Wait-and-See' (65.49). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 111,890, a decrease of about 4.7% from 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competition due to the smaller candidate pool. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei (not in the province), with an enrollment share in Heilongjiang of about 2.2%–2.7%, a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments. Wuhan, as a central city in central China, has some regional appeal to candidates from the northeast.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound of the 2025 ranking to 7531, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 1 student (+7.1%) intensifying competition, the Soft Science ranking rising by 5 places enhancing attractiveness, and the decrease of Physics Category candidates in the province by about 4.7% easing competition, along with positive effects from the ranking rise and candidate reduction, a slight forward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7824, with a range of 7324–8324.

For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Statistics, Public Finance, Computer categories) as the main choice, with Tier 1 (Law, Finance, Accounting) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Journalism and Communication) as a safety. For rankings significantly above the upper limit (<7324), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the lower limit (>8324), focus on Tier 2 with Tier 3 as safety.
